name: codex-open
title: Codex Open
description: Search VS Code Project Manager projects and open them in Codex
author: miaonster

commands.name: search-project-manager-projects
commands.title: Open Project in Codex
commands.subtitle: Project Manager
commands.description: Search VS Code Project Manager projects and open them in Codex

preferences.name: hideProjectsNotEnabled
preferences.title: Hide Projects
preferences.label: not enabled
preferences.description: Hide projects whose enabled flag is false

preferences.name: vscodeApp
preferences.title: VS Code-compatible App
preferences.description: Used only to locate Project Manager storage when Projects Location is blank

preferences.name: projectManagerDataPath
preferences.title: Projects Location
preferences.description: Set this only if the VS Code Project Manager extension stores projects in a custom directory
